<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Clicking toggles squares between green (N) and their original color

#

result = action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 50, 'col': 26},

])
print(f"Result: done={last_action_result.get('done')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nGrid:")
for r in [49, 54, 59]:
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][22:39]}")
</parameter>
</function>
